name: Murshid
overview: Ex-don Murshid is forced out of exile when his former accomplice turned rival, Farid, traps his son in a gang war. Can Murshid reclaim his rule over the city as he saves his son?

trailers.title: Murshid | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Kay Kay Menon | Premieres 30th August 2024 on ZEE5
